About Us

Gujarat's Trusted Panel Board Manufacturer

Gee And Sons Electricals is a leading manufacturer and supplier of industrial electrical panel boards based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. We specialize in custom-built MCC, PCC, APFC, Control, ATS, and Main LT Distribution Boards for factories, industries, and commercial establishments across India.

We provide end-to-end electrical panel solutions — from design and manufacturing to supply, installation, testing, and after-sales service. All our panels are manufactured as per IS and IEC standards using quality components from ABB, Schneider, L&T, Siemens, and other leading brands.

🏭
IS/IEC Standards
All panels as per IS 8623 & IEC 61439
⚡
Premium Components
ABB, Schneider, L&T, Siemens brands
🔧
Custom Fabrication
Designed as per your specifications
✅
Tested & Certified
Factory acceptance testing for every panel

Electrical Panel Boards We Make

Motor Control
MCC Panel
Motor Control Center
⚡ Up to 2500A | 415V, 3 Phase

Complete motor control solution for starting and protecting motors for pumps, fans, compressors and conveyors in industrial environments.

  • MCCB, Contactor, Overload Relay
  • Digital meter — V, A, kW, PF
  • Push buttons, Indicator lamps
  • IP42 to IP55 rated enclosures
Learn More →
Power Distribution
PCC Panel
Power Control Center
⚡ Up to 4000A | 415V, 3 Phase

Main power distribution panel connecting incoming supply from transformer to multiple outgoing feeders across a factory or facility.

  • ACB / MCCB incomer
  • Copper / aluminium busbars
  • Multifunction power analyzer
  • Draw-out or fixed type design
Learn More →
Power Factor
APFC Panel
Auto Power Factor Correction
⚡ 25 kVAR to 1500 kVAR

Automatically improves power factor to near unity, reducing electricity bills and avoiding penalty charges from DISCOM / utility provider.

  • APFC relay controller
  • Capacitor banks with contactors
  • Digital power factor meter
  • 8 to 16 capacitor steps
Learn More →
Control
Control Panel
General Electrical Control Panel
⚡ Custom Rating as per Load

Manual and semi-automatic control of machines, motors, HVAC equipment and utilities with push buttons, selector switches and indicator lamps.

  • MCB, Contactor, Overload Relay
  • Start/Stop/Emergency Stop
  • Manual/Auto selector switch
  • R-Y-B indicator pilot lamps
Learn More →
Change Over
ATS Panel
Automatic Transfer Switch Panel
⚡ 63A to 2500A | Auto/Manual

Automatically transfers electrical supply from mains to generator (DG set) on power failure, ensuring uninterrupted power supply.

  • SOCOMEC / Havells ATS relay
  • Mains and DG indicators
  • Auto/Manual/Off mode
  • Time delay settings
Learn More →
Distribution
MLDB Panel
Main LT Distribution Board
⚡ Up to 2000A | Commercial & Industrial

Distributes LT power from main incomer to multiple sub-circuits in commercial buildings, hospitals, malls, data centers and factories.

  • ACB / MCCB incomer
  • MCB outgoing feeders in rows
  • Energy meter, voltmeter
  • Neutral and earth busbar
Learn More →
Motor Control Center

MCC Panel Board

⚡ Up to 2500A | 415V, 3 Phase | IP42–IP55

Motor Control Center (MCC) Panel is designed for starting, stopping, and protecting multiple motors from a single centralized panel. Our MCC panels are used in water treatment plants, steel mills, textile factories, cement plants, and pumping stations. Each feeder section has its own MCCB, contactor, and overload relay providing individual motor protection.

Key Components

  • MCCB (16A–1600A) — ABB/Schneider
  • Contactor — ABB/L&T/Siemens
  • Thermal Overload Relay
  • Digital Multifunction Meter
  • Push Buttons — Start/Stop
  • R-Y-B Indicator Lamps
  • Copper Busbars (R-Y-B-N)
  • Terminal Blocks — Connectwell

Applications

  • Water treatment & pumping stations
  • Steel plants & rolling mills
  • Textile & spinning mills
  • Cement & chemical factories
  • HVAC & chiller plant control
  • Agriculture pump control
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us
Power Control Center

PCC Panel Board

⚡ Up to 4000A | 415V, 3 Phase | IP42–IP54

Power Control Center (PCC) Panel serves as the main power distribution hub in a factory or large facility. It receives incoming supply from the transformer and distributes it to multiple sub-panels and motor feeders. Built with heavy-duty copper busbars rated for full load capacity.

Key Components

  • ACB (Air Circuit Breaker) — ABB/Schneider
  • MCCB outgoing feeders
  • Copper/Aluminium Busbars
  • Multifunction Power Analyzer
  • Voltmeter & Ammeter
  • CT/PT metering instruments
  • Surge Protection Device (SPD)

Applications

  • Industrial factories & plants
  • Substations & power rooms
  • Commercial complexes
  • Data centers
  • Large infrastructure projects
  • Mining operations
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us
Automatic Power Factor Correction

APFC Panel Board

⚡ 25 kVAR to 1500 kVAR | Auto/Manual

APFC Panel automatically monitors and corrects the power factor of your electrical system to near unity (0.99). This reduces reactive power demand, avoids penalty charges from your electricity provider, and improves overall system efficiency. Our APFC panels are suitable for all industrial and commercial consumers.

Key Components

  • APFC Relay Controller — L&T/Epcos
  • Capacitor Banks (KVAR steps)
  • Capacitor Duty Contactors
  • MCCBs for protection
  • Digital Power Factor Meter
  • Voltmeter 415V
  • Auto/Manual selector

Benefits

  • Reduces electricity bill
  • Avoids DISCOM penalty charges
  • Improves voltage regulation
  • Reduces cable losses
  • Suitable for all industries
  • 8 to 16 step control
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us
Electrical Control Panel

Control Panel Board

⚡ Custom Rating | Manual & Semi-Auto Control

General purpose electrical control panels for manual and semi-automatic operation of machines, motors, HVAC systems and utilities. Each panel is custom-designed as per the specific equipment and load requirements of the customer.

Key Components

  • MCB, Contactor, Overload Relay
  • Start / Stop push buttons
  • Emergency Stop (mushroom head)
  • Manual/Auto selector switch
  • R-Y-B Indicator pilot lamps
  • Digital hour run meter
  • Timer relay

Applications

  • Machine tool control
  • HVAC & chiller control
  • Pump & fan control
  • Conveyor control
  • Utility control panels
  • Agricultural pump panels
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us
Automatic Transfer Switch

ATS Change Over Panel

⚡ 63A to 2500A | Mains to DG Auto Transfer

ATS (Automatic Transfer Switch) Change Over Panel provides seamless automatic transfer of power supply from mains (EB) to generator (DG Set) on power failure and back to mains on power restoration. Ensures zero downtime for critical operations.

Key Components

  • SOCOMEC / Havells ATS Relay
  • MCCB for Mains & DG
  • Phase indicators (R-Y-B)
  • Mains ON / DG ON lamps
  • Manual changeover switch
  • Time delay relay
  • Copper earth busbar

Applications

  • Hospitals & clinics
  • Data centers & server rooms
  • Commercial buildings
  • Industrial facilities
  • Cold storage plants
  • Telecom towers
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us
Main LT Distribution Board

MLDB Panel Board

⚡ Up to 2000A | Buildings & Facilities

Main LT Distribution Board distributes low tension power from the main incomer to multiple outgoing sub-circuits in commercial buildings, hospitals, shopping malls, data centers and large factories. Compact, organized and fully labeled.

Key Components

  • ACB / MCCB main incomer
  • MCB outgoing feeders in rows
  • Copper busbars (R-Y-B-N-E)
  • Digital energy meter (kWh)
  • Voltmeter & Ammeter
  • Surge Protection Device
  • Circuit identification labels

Applications

  • Commercial buildings
  • Hospitals & healthcare
  • Shopping malls & airports
  • Data centers
  • Hotels & resorts
  • Residential complexes
Request Quotation 📞 Call Us

Process

How Our Panel Boards Work

Understanding the electrical journey from incoming power to controlled output across every panel we manufacture.

01
Power Input

Incoming 415V supply from transformer or DG enters through Main Incomer (ACB/MCCB) with SPD protection.

02
Busbar System

Copper R-Y-B busbars carry full current and distribute to all outgoing feeders safely and efficiently.

03
Protection

MCCBs, MCBs, RCCBs and overload relays protect against short circuit, overload and earth fault.

04
Control

Contactors, push buttons and selector switches allow operators to start, stop and control all connected loads.

05
Monitoring

Digital meters display live voltage, current, power factor, kWh and frequency for real-time monitoring.

Every panel uses premium components from globally trusted brands — ensuring reliability, safety and long service life.

Why Choose Us

Why Gee And Sons Electricals?

We don't just manufacture panels — we deliver complete electrical solutions with quality, reliability and service.

🏆
IS / IEC Standard Quality

All panels manufactured as per IS 8623 and IEC 61439 standards. Factory acceptance testing done before dispatch.

⚙️
Premium Brand Components

We use ABB, Schneider, L&T, Siemens, Havells components only — no local or substandard parts used in any panel.

📐
Custom Built Panels

Every panel is designed and built as per your exact specifications, load requirements, and site conditions.

🚚
On-Time Delivery

We commit to delivery timelines and ensure panels are dispatched on schedule. No delays, no excuses.

🔧
Installation Support

Our experienced engineers provide complete installation, testing and commissioning support at your site in Gujarat.

📞
After Sales Service

Dedicated after-sales support for all panels supplied. Repairing and maintenance services also available.

💰
Competitive Pricing

Best quality at fair prices. We offer transparent quotations with no hidden charges. GST invoice provided.

🛡️
Warranty Included

All panels come with standard warranty coverage. Extended warranty available on request.
